top_signals.title: Nvidia’s $1 Trillion Slide Sends Valuation to Pre-AI Boom Levels
top_signals.summary: After losing roughly $1 trillion in market value in less than two months, Nvidia Corp.’s stock is the cheapest it’s been since before the AI boom kicked off and sent the shares into the stratosphere.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: NATO seeks to placate Trump with defense deals and spending announcements
top_signals.summary: Before Trump's arrival, NATO's chief trumpeted a series of initiatives and deals and called for a defense ​industry "revolution" across the alliance.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
